About this bot:

Not much to say about the stranded series. You go on a cruise. Either it will crash or forget you on a island. This senario? you go on a cruise trip. They stop at an island and let a few people stay on each island. 2 days of survival later they will pack and leave. Part of the package.... Other than the fact you and melody got left behind. You have no idea who she is, big cruise after all.
